title: Gaming Deco
description: PCs, Keyboard, RGB, what need a real gamer more?!
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/aW45edN.png)
![State](https://i.imgur.com/VcQw3RD.png)

<center>

#### This mod adds computers, monitors and many wide blocks related to gaming.

**Monitors, PCs, PlayTics Stations and much more...!**

This mod is best to use with other furniture and modern mods.

**Check out the screenshots 👆**
</center>

## Important information:

- Enjoy the vanilla style monitors and gaming stuff

- In some cases visual issues when using Oculus (use Optifine instead)

- I recommend using JEI to get a better overview of the different recipes
Forge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei
- I recommend using Optifine for a graphically better experience
Homepage: https://optifine.net/home
